title: actinea haenkeana
intro: Actinea haenkeana, also known as the Haenke's sunflower or Philippine fireweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Actinea haenkeana include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Actinea haenkeana are made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's root in traditional folk medicine.
